summary: Iter13 testing complete — all features verified. (1) BACKEND GET /api/dashboard/stats: pipeline_funnel = {new:24, demo_booked:1, converted:2} (no stale 1664). pipeline_funnel_by_source exists with franchise:{new:9, demo_booked:1, converted:2}, licence:{new:15}, other:{}. recent_enquiries = exactly the 5 expected May-2026 records (Sally Hare 2026-05-14, Tracy Wilkinson 2026-05-14, Sue Gadler 2026-05-12, Karen Kinnersley 2026-05-12, Mary Fetterplace 2026-05-12). (2) BACKEND regression GET /api/contacts?tab=pipeline returns 27 records, all in_pipeline=true, 15 licence_enquiry + 12 franchise_enquiry. (3) FRONTEND Dashboard funnel bars render exactly: New 24, Contacted 0, Qualified 0, Demo Booked 1, Converted 2, Lost 0. Recent Enquiries shows the 5 expected names in DD-MM-YYYY format (14-05-2026 / 12-05-2026). (4) FRONTEND /contacts on Pipeline tab: data-testid='source-filter' visible with 3 buttons — source-all 'All 27', source-franchise 'Franchise 12', source-licence 'Licence 15'. (5) Filter behavior verified via data-testid='pipeline-card-*': source-all → 27 cards (12 franchise + 15 licence by pill), source-franchise → 12 cards (12 franchise / 0 licence), source-licence → 15 cards (0 franchise / 15 licence), source-all again → 27. (6) Compose source-licence + age-tier-fresh → 15 licence cards (all <=30d, May 2026). (7) Pipeline-summary stat tiles recompute per source: franchise → NEW 9 / DEMO BOOKED 1 / CONVERTED 2 / LOST 0; licence → NEW 15 / others 0. (8) List view + source-licence → table shows 15 rows, all with LICENCE pill, 0 franchise. (9) source-filter hidden on Franchise Contacts, Licence Contacts, and General Contacts tabs (verified data-testid='source-filter' returns null on all three). (10) Skipped destructive bulk-move + source restoration test per agent-to-agent note (state-restoration fragility). Pytest 4/4 PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: ContactsPage.js still well over the 700-line splitting threshold (~1180 lines after iter12). Iter13 added sourceFilter state + visibleItems memo + source-filter button group — file keeps growing. Consider extracting SourceFilter as a small subcomponent and Kanban/ListView into separate files in next refactor pass.

Source filter button label currently shows '{Label} {count}' inline ('Franchise 12'). For better screen-reader/data-binding the count could be wrapped in its own <span data-testid='source-franchise-count'> so future tests can read count independently of label text — minor enhancement.

server.py dashboard_stats now aggregates pipeline_funnel + pipeline_funnel_by_source in two passes over web_form_contacts with in_pipeline:true filter. For 27 records this is trivial; if pipeline grows large, a single Mongo aggregation $group on (in_pipeline, source, pipeline_status) would be more efficient than client-side counting.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — source filter button group, kanban filtering, list-view filtering, age+source compose, stat-tile recompute, source-filter hidden on non-pipeline tabs, dashboard bars and recent enquiry list all verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter13 stable. Pipeline state: 27 contacts (24 new + 1 demo_booked + 2 converted). Licence in pipeline=15 (all new), Franchise in pipeline=12 (9 new + 1 demo_booked + 2 converted). data-testid for source filter buttons = source-all / source-franchise / source-licence (each shows '{label} {count}' inline). Kanban card data-testid = pipeline-card-{id}. Tab buttons use data-testid mode-pipeline / mode-franchise / mode-licence / mode-general (NOT tab-*). Stat tiles use data-testid stat-new/stat-contacted/stat-qualified/stat-demo_booked/stat-converted/stat-lost. Source filter is rendered ONLY when mode==='pipeline'. test_iter13_funnel_source.py is idempotent (read-only) — safe to re-run.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in iter13 implementation. Both code changes (dashboard funnel in_pipeline=true filter + pipeline_funnel_by_source split; ContactsPage source filter button group composing with age filter) work exactly as specified.
